title: hieracium conspurcans subsp. eueimon
side_effects: Hieracium conspurcans subsp. eueimon can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing stomach irritation, nausea, and vomiting due to its potential toxicity. Ingesting large quantities may also lead to diarrhea, headaches, and dizziness in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its sap or extracts can cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, or even contact dermatitis in sensitive people. Furthermore, improper handling or processing of the plant may result in contamination with other harmful substances, exacerbating its potential side effects.
